DTC.DESCRIPTION: Drive Motor "A" Phase U-V-W Current Sensor Correlation

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Time after powerup is greater than cal threshold, PSR voltage is within cal range, and sensor reference voltage is inside normal range
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: If motor current sensor checksum is greater than cal threshold (40A), MGCU motor current checksum error - fault 244
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: Motor: MGLOS_DISABLE_IPU, Generator: MGLOS_OK, VVC: VVCLOS_OK Definitions: MGLOS_DISABLE_IPU - Permanently turn off all switches in the inverter. This means there will be zero DC power usage, and zero 3-phase current flowing in the motor/generator. This mode is NOT recoverable even if the fault clears (for that power cycle). MGLOS_OK - Take no action VVCLOS_OK - No action taken
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: on powersplit or BEV PDU HEV Hazard Lamp - red triangle, vehicle shutdown/no-start and for plugin, MIL - check engine as well

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Test fails if 3phase interlock test in MGCU fails for Motor- 3 phase current not within expected range. Fault 304
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: Definitions: MGLOS_DISABLE_IPU - Permanently turn off all switches in the inverter. This means there will be zero DC power usage, and zero 3-phase current flowing in the motor/generator. This mode is NOT recoverable even if the fault clears (for that power cycle). VVCLOS_OK - No action taken Motor: MGLOS_DISABLE_IPU, Generator:MGLOS_DISABLE_IPU, VVC: VVCLOS_OK
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: on powersplit or BEV PDU HEV Hazard Lamp and Vehicle shutdown/no-start and for plugin, MIL - check engine

DTC.DESCRIPTION: Drive Motor "B" Current Low

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: ***3phase Interlock***: MGCU PSR voltage inside cal range, MGCU control is NOT in Six Step mode, MGCU control is NOT in Angle Sweeping mode, high voltage interlock check is enabled after HCU allows switching. ***Cable swap***: (HCU has requested MGCU to run cable swap test or developmental cable swap test is requested) and cable swap test is enabled
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_PERIOD: ***3phase Interlock***: MGCU: detection at power up and then at a rate of 1ms ***Cable swap***: MGCU: detection at power up and then at a rate of 10ms 100ms
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: ***3phase Interlock***: Test fails if 3phase interlock test in MGCU fails for Generator- 3 phase current not being within expected range. Fault 304 (MHT) Fault 305 (Powersplit) ***Cable swap***: Powersplit: Test fails if 3phase HV AC cables swap test in MGCU fails for injected test frequency response signal magnitude or phase not being within expected range. MHT: Test fails if 3phase HV AC cables swap test or generator resolver wires swap test in MGCU fails for injected test frequency response signal magnitude or phase not being within expected range. Fault 308 (MHT) Fault 309 (Powersplit)
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: ***3phase Interlock***: Powersplit: Motor: MGLOS_DISABLE_IPU, Generator:MGLOS_DISABLE_IPU, VVC: VVCLOS_OK Definitions: MGLOS_DISABLE_IPU - Permanently turn off all motor and generator switches in the inverter. This means there will be zero DC power usage, and zero 3-phase current flowing in the motor/generator. This mode is NOT recoverable even if the fault clears (for that power cycle). VVCLOS_OK - No action taken MHT: Generator: MGLOS_DISABLE_IPU MGLOS_DISABLE_IPU - Permanently turn off all generator switches in the inverter. This means there will be zero DC power usage, and zero 3-phase current flowing in the generator. This mode is NOT recoverable even if the fault clears (for that power cycle). ***Cable swap***: Powersplit: Motor: MGLOS_DISABLE_IPU, Generator:MGLOS_DISABLE_IPU, VVC: MGLOS_DISABLE_IPU Definitions: MGLOS_DISABLE_IPU - Permanently turn off all motor, generator and VVC switches in the inverter. This means there will be zero DC power usage, and zero 3-phase current flowing in the motor/generator. This mode is NOT recoverable even if the fault clears (for that power cycle). MHT: Generator: MGLOS_DISABLE_IPU MGLOS_DISABLE_IPU - Permanently turn off all generator switches in the inverter. This means there will be zero DC power usage, and zero 3-phase current flowing in the generator. This mode is NOT recoverable even if the fault clears (for that power
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: on powersplit or BEV PDU HEV Hazard Lamp and vehicle shutdown and for plugin, MIL - check engine

DTC.DESCRIPTION: Drive Motor "A" Position Sensor Not Learned

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: (SPI fault is not set) AND Initial communication messages sent OK
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Test passes if motor resolver offset (Contained in TRID block) is within acceptable range.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: Use default resolver offsets and allow limitted operation of electric motor - reduced max torque and max speed
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: FHEV: yellow rench, PHEV: Check Engine (MIL), Reduced vehicle performance, limited torque and speed.

DTC.DESCRIPTION: Drive Motor "A" Torque Delivered Performance

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: All of the following conditions must be True for fault to be evaluated: 1. PSR voltage in normal range 2. Vehicle not in Coastdown mode - special operating mode initiated by driver 3. Vehicle is in a torque-producing mode, vehicle has been started 4. Vehicle is not in an ABS event
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: If 1) motor system is temporarily disabled or 2) temporarily forced to "zero-torque" mode by any fault detection, this fault will trip in one second. This is designed to not allow excessive temporary disablements of the system without some sort of driver notification.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: Disable Motor for duration of power cycle - vehicle can operate with Generator and Engine in a "limp-home" mode with reduced performance.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: on powersplit or BEV PDU HEV Hazard indication - red triangle lamp and for plugin, MIL - check engine

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: TAOP PWM feedback indicates an under-current condition for more than 2 seconds

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Time after powerup is greater than cal threshold, PSR voltage is within cal range, and Vehicle mode is past INIT - KEY is in run position, and TAOP communication (PWM) has been established
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: TAOP PWM feedback indicates an overcurrent condition for more than 2 seconds and ambient air temperature is greater than -10 degrees C.

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: All of the following conditions must be TRUE to run this test: 1. Time after powerup greater than CAL (3 seconds) 2. DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Test fails if Upper VVC IGBT temperature is more than 30 degC different from PCM's ECT measurement after the required soak time. Temperature must be different for at least 700ms continuously.

DTC.DESCRIPTION: Generator Position Sensor Circuit "A" Range/Performance

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Powersplit: Time after powerup is greater than cal threshold, PSR voltage inside normal range, MGCU 2.5V A2D reference voltage inside normal range, 5V A/D supply voltage is within cal range, R2D chip reported Generator Resolver Error Fault has not set, and "Generator Resolver circuitry and R2D chip Error" Fault has not set MHT: Time after powerup is greater than cal threshold, PSR voltage inside normal range, MGCU 2.5V A2D reference voltage inside normal range, R2D chip reported Generator Resolver Error Fault has not set, and "Generator Resolver circuitry and R2D chip Error" Fault has not set
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Test fails if resolver's boosted power supply voltage is outside of calibrateable range (Powersplit: higher than 34V or lower than 26V; MHT: higher than 22.390V or lower than 17.469V) for 50ms. fault 260 (MHT) fault 261 (Powersplit)
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: No action taken by fault detection other than reporting
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: FHEV: no fault indicator lamp, PHEV: MIL - check engine

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_PERIOD: MGCU: 1ms fault detection rate, 100ms DTC test
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Test fails when generator resolver cosine circuit S3 shorts to ground for 10ms continuously. fault 312 (MHT)
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: The generator inverter will be temporarily disabled. If the fault intermittently sets and clears more than 7 times in 14 seconds, the fault action becomes permanent. DTC will set after 250ms of continuous inverter disablement, or excessive toggling between enabled/disabled.

DTC.DESCRIPTION: Drive Motor "A" Inverter Voltage Too High

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: None, test runs continuous whenever module is powered.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_PERIOD: MGCU: 100us fault detection rate; 1ms fault reporting rate. 100ms
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Test fails if hardwire Overvoltage indication from inverter fault signal is received (for <1ms), indicating DC bus over voltage failure/automatic shutdown of inverter. MHT hardware over voltage ranges: FHEV: 369V to 390V PHEV: 452V to 479V Hardware shutsdown the electric machine immediately fault 202
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: Powersplit: This fault will temporarily disable both motor and generator systems and put VVC in bypass. This may feel like a momentary interruption of torque, depending on vehicle conditions when it occurs. If the fault persist for more than 250ms, the DTC will set. If the fault intermittently sets and clears rapidly (7 times in 14 seconds), the DTC will be set as well. If the fault persists for more than 1 second, the vehicle will shutdown (with an additional DTC) MHT: This fault will temporarily disable motor. If the fault persist for more than 250ms, the DTC will set. If the fault intermittently sets and clears rapidly (7 times in 14 seconds), the DTC will be set as well. If the fault persists for more than 1 second, the vehicle will shutdown (with an additional DTC)
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: If the fault persists for more than 250ms, for FHEV yellow wrench, and for PHEV the MIL - check engine light will illuminate. The customer may notice short reductions in torque as well. If the fault persists for more than 1 second, the vehicle will shutdown, and on powersplit or BEV PDU HEV Hazard lamp will illuminate.

DTC.DESCRIPTION: DC/DC Converter Step Up Voltage Performance

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Time after powerup is greater than cal threshold, PSR voltage is within cal range, and MGCU A2D reference voltage is in range
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Test fails if VVC lower IGBT hardwire error lines to MGCU indicate a fault, or if VVC selftest fails for lower IGBT. Logical Fault conditions: One or more of the following fault conditions must be TRUE in order to generate the DTC. Fault conditions: 1) MGCU fault VVC lower IGBT fail (hardwired signal) - MGCU fault #340 2) MGCU fault VVC lower leg selftest fail - MGCU fault #342 3) Excessive number of fault condition #1 detected in a short time (intermittent fault)
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: Motor: NA, Generator: NA, VVC: VVCLOS_BYPASS - Permanently force top switch closed, and bottom switch open, for the rest of this power cycle. - In this mode we can have bi-directional power flow, but no voltage boosting. This results in a small loss of vehicle performance.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: FHEV: yellow wrench, PHEV: Check Engine (MIL)

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Reduced performance at high battery temperatures. Low performance due to cold battery after on-plug preconditioning in cold conditions.

DTC.DESCRIPTION: Drive Motor "A" Inverter Voltage Sensor "A" Circuit

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Time after powerup is greater than 100ms, PSR voltage is within normal range, and current sensor reference voltages are inside normal range.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: DC inverter voltage sensor is reading less than 0.235V, indicating open circuit or short to ground
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: Inverter will stop the DC Boost converter action, which will limit motor/generator max torque capability roughly 10%
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: FHEV: yellow wrench, PHEV: Check Engine (MIL), Slight reduction in vehicle performance that could be noticeable by discerning customer.

DTC.DESCRIPTION: DC/DC Converter Over Temperature

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: 100ms after powerup, Vehicle PSR voltage within normal range, 2.5V power supply voltage within normal range, and Inductor temperature sensor NOT faulted.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Inductor temperature sensor read 170 degC for more than 1 second
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: Zero torque limit applied to motor and Generator temporarily - can recover if temperature decreases
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: FHEV: yellow wrench, PHEV: Check Engine (MIL), Potential reduction in vehicle performance lasting for the duration of the over-temperature condition.

DTC.DESCRIPTION: Hybrid/EV Battery Voltage/Drive Motor "A" Inverter Voltage Correlation

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Time after powerup is greater than cal threshold (0.5 sec), PSR voltage is within normal range, inverter voltage sensors not faulted, HV battery voltage signal not faulted, and HV battery contactor status signal not faulted and indicating contactors are closed. Details: Logical Entry conditions: All of the following Entry conditions must be TRUE in order to enter an Entry state for this DTC. Entry conditions: 1) Powerup timer is GREATER than threshold for putmr, to check flt (calibrateable, [pvp_hv_delta_putmr = 0.50] seconds) 2) PSR voltage is between 6.0 and 19.0 V 3) Bat voltage CAN signal not faulted 4) HV battery's contactor status signal not faulted 5) HV Battery indicates contactors are closed 6) HPCM request for contactors closed 7) Input voltage sensor is NOT faulted 8) VVC output voltage sensor is NOT faulted 9) Battery NOT sending BPO (Battery Power Off) CAN signal 10) Neither HV Battery nor inverter hardware detecting any HV interlock faults
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Test fails if difference between HV battery voltage and inverter voltage is greater than min CAL threshold. Inverter input voltage is used directly, inverter output voltage is used only if VVC is not boosting and not disabled. Details: Logical Fault conditions: #1 OR (#2 AND #3 AND #4) In order to generate this DTC either #1 must be TRUE or #2, #3, #4 must all be TRUE. If all of the Fault conditions are TRUE, the DTC will also be generated. Fault conditions: 1) (Battery voltage from BECM - VVC input voltage measurement from MGCU) is GREATER than calibrateable threshold, [pvp_hv_delta_v_lim = 60.0] Volts 2) (VVC input voltage measurement from mgcu - VVC output voltage measurement from MGCU) is GREATER than calibrateable threshold , [pvp_hv_delta_v_lim = 60.0] Volts 3) VVC is not boosting. 4) VVC is not disabled. Fault conditions must be present for 500ms to be detected as a confirmed fault.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: This fault will disable the motor and generator subsystems for the remainder of the power cycle. Vehicle shutdown.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: on powersplit or BEV PDU HEV Hazard Lamp and for plugin, MIL - check engine

DTC.DESCRIPTION: Hybrid/EV Battery Pack Coolant Control Valve "C" Performance/Stuck Off

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: PSR voltage inside valid range. TBCIV comminication is not missing.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: 1) Valve has reported no errors but repeated calibration attempts have failed. OR CPV comminicate one of the following statuses: 2) unexpected blocking point 3) mechanical break 4) open load 1) Valve has reported no errors but repeated calibration attempts have failed. OR CPV comminicate one of the following statuses: 2) unexpected blocking point 3) mechanical break 4) open load
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: disable radiator cooling of battery if in unrecognized position. Otherwise reporting only
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Reduced or disabled battery cooling potentially resulting in power limiting.

DTC.DESCRIPTION: Generator Phase U-V-W Current Sensor Correlation

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Time after powerup is greater than cal threshold, PSR voltage is within cal range, 2.5V A/D referece voltage is within normal range, no 3-phase current sensor offset failure and current sensor reference voltage is inside normal range
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_PERIOD: MGCU Checksum detection rate is 100 us and checksum error detection rate is 1ms. 100ms
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: If generator current sensor checksum is greater than cal threshold (powersplit: 30A, MHT: 40A) for a calibrateable time (500ms), MGCU fault generator checksum error - fault 244 (MHT) fault 245: (powersplit)
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: MHT: Generator: MGLOS_DISABLE_IPU HF45: Motor: MGLOS_OK, Generator: MGLOS_DISABLE_IPU, VVC: VVCLOS_OK Definitions: MGLOS_DISABLE_IPU - Permanently turn off all switches in the inverter. This means there will be zero DC power usage, and zero 3-phase current flowing in the motor/generator. This mode is NOT recoverable even if the fault clears (for that power cycle). MGLOS_OK - Take no action VVCLOS_OK - No action taken
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: on powersplit or BEV PDU HEV Hazard Lamp and LOS Electric Operation - no generator or engine operation, and for plugin MIL - check engine

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Test passes if generator resolver offset value stored in TRID block is within acceptable range. fault 306 (MHT) fault 307 (Powersplit)

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Time after powerup is greater than cal threshold, PSR voltage is within normal range, and MGCU A2D reference voltage is in range.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: If input High Voltage DC voltage reading is outside of cal thresholds to indicate open circuit / short circuit, test fails.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: No action taken - redundant info from HV battery used instead.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: FHEV: no fault indicator lamp, PHEV: MIL - check engine

DTC.DESCRIPTION: Engine Failed to Crank

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Engine locked fault runs if PSR voltage inside cal range, motor speed, gen speed, gen torque estimate, ECM's engine speed all okay to use, and vehicle must in an engine starting op mode. Details: Logical Entry conditions (check_abnormal_eng_speed(void)): #1 AND #2 AND #3 AND #4 AND #5 AND #6 AND (#7 OR #8 OR #9). Entry conditions #1-#6 must be TRUE, in addition either one (or more) of the following Entry conditions must be TRUE #7 OR #8 OR #9 in order to enter an Entry state for this DTC. Entry conditions (check_abnormal_eng_speed(void)): 1) Powerup timer is GREATER than a calibrateable timer value [pvp_englock_putmr = 0.50]. 2) PSR voltage is in normal range 3) Generator speed NOT faulted 4) Motor speed NOT faulted 5) Generator torque estimate NOT faulted 6) Engine speed CAN signal NOT faulted 7) Generator mode command = GM_COLD_ENG_STRT - cold engine start 8) Generator mode command = GM_NORM_ENG_STRT - normal engine start 9) Generator mode command = GM_HI_SPD_ENG_STRT - high speed engine start
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Engine Lock fault fails if: Both sources of engine speed indicate very low engine speed, Generator torque is high enough to expect rapid engine acceleration, and the generator is producing the torque that is commanded of it. Details: Logical Fault conditions: All of the following fault conditions must be TRUE in order to generate the DTC from the abnormal engine speed fault Fault conditions (check_abnormal_eng_speed(void)): 1) Calculated Engine speed is LESS than maximum engine speed for fault detect (calibrateable, [pvp_englock_eng_thr = 20.0] rad/sec) 2) CAN Engine speed from ECM is LESS than maximum engine speed for fault detect (calibrateable, [pvp_englock_eng_thr = 20.0] rad/sec) 3) Difference between generator torque command and estimated generator torque is LESS than maximum diff (calibrateable, [pvp_englock_gtq_dlt = 20.0] Nm) 4) Generator torque command is GREATER than minimum torque threshold (varies with vehicle speed - higher than 40Nm)
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: Motor: NA, Generator: MGLOS_ZEROTQ, VVC: VVCLOS_OK - This fault detection will disable the generator, causing the vehicle to operate with the electric motor only - reduced vehicle performance and range. Definitions: MGLOS_ZEROTQ - Force the torque command to zero, but keep the inverter switching (operating). VVCLOS_OK - No action taken
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: on powersplit or BEV PDU HEV Hazard Lamp and LOS Electric operation and for plugin, MIL - check engine

DTC.DESCRIPTION: DC/DC Converter Current Sensor "A" Circuit

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Time after powerup is greater than cal threshold, PSR voltage is within cal range, and MGCU A2D reference voltage is in range
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: MGCU fault VVC inductor current sensor reference voltage out of range - MGCU fault #326
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: 3) Motor: NA, Generator: NA, VVC: VVCLOS_BYPASS - Permanently force top switch closed, and bottom switch open, for the rest of this power cycle. - In this mode we can have bi-directional power flow, but no voltage boosting. This results in a small loss of vehicle performance.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: FHEV: yellow wrench, PHEV: Check Engine (MIL), Possible reduced performance noticed by customer (approx. 10-20%).

DTC.DESCRIPTION: DC/DC Converter Temperature Sensor "C" Circuit Range/Performance

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: All of the following conditions must be TRUE to run this test: 1. Time after powerup greater than CAL (3 seconds) 2. Time after powerup less than CAL (6 seconds) 3. Vehicle soak time (time spent in non-torque-producing mode) greater than 200 minutes 4. Soak Time measurement is validated OK to use 5. PCM's ECT measurement received in range. 6. Both Motor and Generator torque command below CAL threshold (50 Nm)
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Test fails if inductor temperature is more than 30 degC different from PCM's ECT measurement after the required soak time. Temperature must be different for at least 700ms continuously.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: No direct action taken.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: FHEV: no fault lamp, PHEV: MIL - Check Engine

DTC.DESCRIPTION: Generator Torque Delivered Performance

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: All of the following conditions must be True for fault to be evaluated: 1. PSR voltage in normal range 2. Vehicle not in Coastdown mode - special operating mode initiated by driver 3. Vehicle is in a torque-producing mode, vehicle has been started 4. Vehicle is not in an ABS event
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: If generator system is temporarily disabled or temporarily forced to "zero-torque" mode by any fault detection, this fault will trip in one-second. This is designed to not allow excessive temporary disablements of the system without some sort of driver notification.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: Disable Generator for duration of power cycle - vehicle can operate with electric Motor in a "limp-home" mode with reduced performance and range
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: on powersplit or BEV PDU HEV Hazard indication - red triangle lamp and for plugin, MIL - check engine

DTC.DESCRIPTION: Drive Motor "B" Position Sensor Circuit "C"

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Time after powerup is greater than cal threshold [200ms], PSR voltage is within cal range, 2.5V A/D reference voltage is within cal range
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_PERIOD: MGCU: 1ms fault detection rate, 100ms DTC test
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Test fails when (1) an open circuit is detected in generator resolver Sine circuit (S2 and/or S4) for 10ms continuously OR (2) resolver excitation circuit (R1 and/or R2) shorts to power for 10ms continuously. fault 312 (MHT)
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: The generator inverter will be temporarily disabled. If the fault intermittently sets and clears more than 7 times in 14 seconds, the fault action becomes permanent. DTC will set after 250ms of continuous inverter disablement, or excessive toggling between enabled/disabled.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: TBD - MGCU

DTC.DESCRIPTION: Output Shaft Speed / ABS Wheel Speed Correlation

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Test runs when all of the following conditions are true: 1)Wheels speed signals transmitted by ABS module are being received over CAN and are not faulted 2)Output shaft speed can be measured (no position sensor faults) 3)PSR voltage is within valid range 4)Time since module poweron is greater than cal [pvp_oss_putmr = 0.20 s]
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Test fails when output shaft speed differs from average wheel speeds reported by ABS module for the same axle by more than [pvp_oss_maxdiff = 20.0 rad/sec] for more than [pvp_flt_oss_set = 5000 ms]
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: Output shaft speed will be transmitted as faulty on CAN
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Yellow wrench light; significant loss of torque possible

DTC.DESCRIPTION: Engine Speed Signal

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Time after powerup is greater than cal threshold, PSR voltage is within normal range, motor speed, generator speed, and ECM's CAN engine speed signal are okay to use (no faults), and calculated engine speed (using motor/generator speed) is above min threshold - 500rpm.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Difference between ECM's engine speed and HCU calculated engine speed is greater than CAL threshold [pvp_damper_mxdlt = 57.590] rad/sec for 1 second continuously.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: Generator will be forced to "zero-torque" limited operation mode - engine will be shut-down for that power cycle.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: on powersplit or BEV PDU HEV Hazard lamp, and LOS Electric operation and for plugin, MIL - check engine, No engine power for that power cycle.

DIDS_SUPPORTED_BY_SNAPSHOT.DID_REFS: did_DD00 did_DD01 did_DD02 did_DD05 did_032B did_1E00 did_1E12 did_1E23 did_1E26 did_1E2C did_480B did_480D did_4819 did_481B did_481D did_481E did_481F did_4820 did_4821 did_4822 did_4824 did_4826 did_C020 did_C024 did_D000 did_D008 did_D112 did_D115 did_D70A did_D703 did_F405 did_FD77 did_FD78 did_FD79 did_4823 did_C01D did_C01E

DIDS_SUPPORTED_BY_FREEZE_FRAME.DID_REFS: did_F404 did_F405 did_F40C did_F40D did_F41F did_F430 did_F431 did_F442 did_F449

DTC.DESCRIPTION: Inverter High Voltage Performance

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Time after powerup is greater than cal threshold [ldp_hvlo_putmr] seconds, inverter voltage input sensor not faulted, HV battery voltage signal not faulted, and HV battery contactor status signal not faulted and indicating battery contactors are closed. High voltage battery must not be sending "Battery Power Off" signal or High voltage interlock open signal on CAN. Inverter interlock signal must not be faulted. For second fault condition below, addition entry criteria that first fault condition must not be set, and inverter over-voltage hardware fault must not be set.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Fault Condition #1: (ldp_flt_hvlo) Test fails if both HV battery voltage CAN signal and inverter input voltage signal are both below cal threshold ([ldp_hvlo_lim = 120.0] Voltes for 100ms continuously. Fault Condition #2: (ldp_flt_mtr_v) Test fails if HV Voltage based torque derating for either motor or generator is more than 50% for more than 1 second continuously. Voltage derating factor is determined from voltage measured at inverters, compared to a voltage threshold that is sent from the HV battery controller, and to a max hardware protection voltage threshold.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: This fault will temporarily disable both motor and generator systems, and will feel like a momentary dropout of powertrain torque. This could happen during periods of high acceleration/power demand.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: FHEV: no fault lamp, PHEV: MIL - check engine, Customer could notice momentary interruption of torque, possibly during heavy accelerations or excessive wheel slip manuevers.

DTC.DESCRIPTION: Immediate Shutdown Signal A

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: CAN communication established with either BECM or RCM
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: If BECM indicates a RAPID SHUTDOWN is required for more than 1 CAN message, or if the RCM indicates RAPID DISCHARGE is REQUIRED for more than 200ms when BECM CAN communication has failed.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: Immediate vehicle shutdown and rapid discharge performed
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: on powersplit or BEV PDU HEV Hazard Light and immediate vehicle shutdown

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: MGIPC runs when in torque delivery mode.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_PERIOD: DTC evaluates at 100ms; fault evaluates at 10ms.

DTC.DESCRIPTION: Hybrid Powertrain Control Module - Motor Disabled

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: HEIPC runs when in torque delivery mode and the secondary axle torque must be ramped down.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_PERIOD: DTC evaluates at 100ms; fault evaluates at 10ms.

DTC.DESCRIPTION: Hybrid Powertrain Control Module - Battery Disabled

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Test runs continuously, but all fault conditions require CAN communication with BECM.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: BECM CAN parameters indicates a BPO (Battery Power Off Event) or No-Restart event. Details: Logical fault conditions: One or more of the following fault conditions must be TRUE in order to generate the DTC. Fault conditions: 1) BECM CAN parameters indicate a BPO. 2) BECM CAN parameters indicate a No-Restart event. 3) BECM CAN parameters indicate any type of Interlock fault
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: Vehicle Shutdown

DTC.DESCRIPTION: Engine Coolant Bypass Valve "D" Range/Performance

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: PSR voltage inside valid range. Starting coolant temperature is below a calibratable value of [ccp_hct_latch_max = 0.0 degC ]
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: The HCIV is reporting stuck in combined and the coolent temperature is warming below a calibratable rate. OR The HCIV is reporting that it is in the isolated state but the coolant is warming below a calibratable rate when the PTC is running. This indicates that a large thermal mass is keeping the coolant from warming up quickly (the battery).
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: No action until the battery temperature increases above a threshold at which point it will disable cabin heating to protect the HV battery from over heating.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Poor cabin heating performance. Cabin air slow to heat up.

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: Use last known valid sensor position.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Repair (wrench) light.

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Test fails if the following are true: 1)If a circuit fault is detected in the park pawl motor supply control line from the HPCM to the CAN PDB 2)If a fault is detected in the park pawl motor supply circuit from the CAN PDB to the IPM
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: TBD - thmi
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: lights TBD, vehicle could be stuck in or out of park

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Time after powerup is greater than cal threshold [pvp_prk_pawl_putmr = 0.50 seconds], PSR voltage is within normla range, motor speed not faulted, Gear position is Park, and motor speed is low enough to check for parking pawl engagement.

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: Chiller disabled.

DTC.DESCRIPTION: Hybrid/EV Battery Cooling System "C" Performance

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Test us run when all of the following are true: 1)The chiller is run 2)The battery coolant pump is run above a cal threshold ([btm_dlt_clnt_pump_speed = 0.0]) 3)Communication is not faulted with the BECM 4)Vehicle is not on plug (for PHEVs or BEVs) 5)battery coolant temp is above desired coolant temp plus [btm_clnt_trg_thres = 15.0]
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Test fails when, after the chiller is run for [btm_dt_chill_clnt = 120.0 seconds] the battery coolent temperature has not dropped by more than [btm_chill_clnt_dlt_thres = 3.0 deg C]
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: Chiller disabled.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Check Engine light illuminated. This can prevent HV battery cooling which can lower power limits and performance.

DTC.DESCRIPTION: Wakeup Control

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Time after powerup is greater than cal threshold [hld_hevwake_putmr = 0.10 sec], PSR voltage is within normal range, and no mismatch exists between KEY_RUN hardwire circuit and CAN signal from BCM
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: If the hardwired KEY run signal is received, but the hardwired WAKEUP signal is not, then assume circuit is open or short to ground, condition must be present for 30 seconds continuously
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: None
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: FHEV: not fault indication, PHEV: yellow wrench; Loss of function associated with early-wakeup feature, such as remote data, vehicle preconditioning, etc.

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: PSR voltage inside cal range
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Any missing GSM message for more than [u0103_87_tmout = 10000 msec]. Details: Logical fault conditions: All of the following fault conditions must be TRUE in order to generate DTC for this fault. DTC.DESCRIPTION: Control Module Configuration Memory Corrupt

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: If TRID/SEDID is corrupt then motor/generator torque limits are reduced. If DE00 is used and expected then FAPA is disabled.

DTC.DESCRIPTION: High Voltage System Interlock Circuit "D" Low

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Test fails when the difference between the voltage reported by the battery and the voltage reported by the electric AC module exceed either: 1)cal [ccp_open_conn_vlim = 100.0 V] for [ccp_open_conn_tmout = 1600 msec] OR 2)cal [ccp_high_r_conn_vlim = 50.0 V] for [ccp_high_r_conn_tmout = 2600 V]

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Check engine light illuminated; Cabin cooling non-functional, battery cooling capacity may be limited leading to reduced power limits and performance.
